name: Uptown Gold & Silver Exchange
description_short: Dallas brick-and-mortar shop buying and selling gold, silver, diamonds, and bullion. Also offers jewelry repair, watch repair, and custom jewelry creation.
description_long:
Uptown Gold & Silver Exchange is a local precious metals and jewelry retailer located in Dallas, TX's Uptown neighborhood at 2817 Howell St, Unit 230. Operating under the web brand "Uptown Bullion" (uptownbullion.com), the shop is owned by a proprietor named Joseph and serves the Dallas area in person. No founding year is publicly documented, and the company has not publicized affiliations with industry certification bodies such as the American Numismatic Association or Jewelers of America, though they state they are fully licensed and insured. They operate as a standalone local business — not a chain or franchise.

The shop deals in a wide range of precious metals and jewelry. On the buying side, they purchase gold, silver, platinum, palladium, bullion, estate jewelry, diamond jewelry, and sterling silverware from consumers looking to convert unwanted items to cash. On the selling side, they offer bullion and estate pieces to buyers. Beyond transactions, the shop performs jewelry repairs — including ring sizing and resizing, stone replacement and resetting, chip repair, bracelet and necklace work, and earring repair — as well as watch services such as battery replacement, movement adjustment, part replacement, and full cleaning. They also specialize in refurbishment of luxury watch brands including Rolex, and offer custom jewelry creation from scratch.

What distinguishes Uptown Gold & Silver Exchange most conspicuously is its customer satisfaction record. The shop holds a 5.0 out of 5.0 Google rating across 559 reviews — a near-perfect score at significant review volume, which is unusual in the precious metals and jewelry sector. Reviewers consistently cite transparency, fair pricing, and honest assessments. The shop offers free diagnostics before any repair work is committed to, and simple repairs are often completed same-day or next-day. Their Rolex and luxury watch specialization is a notable differentiator in a market where most general jewelers decline such work.

For the right customer, Uptown Gold & Silver Exchange is a strong local option. The breadth of services — metals buying, bullion sales, repairs, and custom work — under one roof is genuinely convenient, and the review volume suggests consistent quality. The main limitation is the absence of published pricing: all transactions are quote-based and require an in-person visit or phone call, making it impossible to benchmark rates before walking in. The shop is also a single Dallas location with no online transaction capability, no mobile app, and no remote service options, meaning it is inherently inaccessible to anyone outside the Dallas metro.
pros: Near-perfect 5.0/5 Google rating across 559 reviews — unusually strong at that review volume
Free assessment before any repair work begins — no charge to get a quote
Same-day or next-day turnaround on simple jewelry and watch repairs
Specializes in luxury watch brands including Rolex repair and full refurbishment
Handles a broad range of precious metals: gold, silver, platinum, palladium, and bullion
Offers custom jewelry creation in addition to standard repair services
Consistently praised for transparent, fair pricing with no pressure tactics
cons: No published pricing — all quotes are item-specific and require a visit or phone call
Single Dallas location only — no online transactions, shipping, or remote services
No BBB profile found, so third-party accreditation status cannot be independently verified
Founded year and full ownership details are not publicly disclosed
No mobile app or online portal; all business is conducted in person or by phone
best_for: Dallas-area residents wanting to sell gold, silver, estate jewelry, or sterling silverware for cash
Local buyers seeking bullion or estate jewelry pieces
Watch owners needing luxury brand repair or refurbishment, including Rolex
Consumers needing ring sizing, stone resetting, or custom jewelry work in the Dallas metro
diagnosis: Uptown Gold & Silver Exchange is best for Dallas-area consumers who want to sell precious metals or need trusted jewelry and watch repair from a shop with a documented track record of satisfied customers. The main caveat is that all pricing is quote-based with no published rates, so comparison shopping requires a direct visit or call — and the shop's services are entirely unavailable to anyone outside the Dallas area.
services: Platinum and palladium buying and selling
Watch battery replacement and movement adjustment
